events.name: TSG Hoffenheim at 1. FC Union Berlin

headlines.description: Harry Kane scored a hat trick in Bayern Munich's 7-0 win over Bochum to set a club record for most goals by a player in his first five league games.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane hits hat trick as Bayern thrash Bochum 7-0

video.headline: Harry Kane scores first hat trick with Bayern

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Harry Kane scores first hat trick with Bayern) 2023/09/23 ESHEET

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund's Marco Reus slotted in a second-half winner to give his team a 1-0 victory over in-form Wolfsburg after a largely toothless game.
headlines.shortLinkText: Reus hands Dortmund nervy win over Wolfsburg

video.headline: Marco Reus break the deadlock for Dortmund

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Marco Reus break the deadlock for Dortmund) 2023/09/23 ESHEET
